Record Class CookingSkillConfig

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
net.sylphian.minecraft.cooking.skill.CookingSkillConfig
Record Components:
xpPerRecipe - base XP per completed recipe, before quality and passive multipliers
discoveryXp - one-time XP awarded the first time a player cooks a recipe
milestoneXp - XP awarded each time a player reaches a mastery milestone
efficientCookChancePercent - Efficient Cook chance to spare one ingredient per cook
quickPrepReductionPercent - Quick Prep flat cook-time reduction
seasonedHandsMaxStacks - Seasoned Hands maximum streak stacks
seasonedHandsQualityPerStack - Perfect-weight added per Seasoned Hands stack
seasonedHandsXpPerStackPercent - XP percent added per Seasoned Hands stack
seasonedHandsResetSeconds - seconds without a cook before the streak resets
seasonedHandsResetDistance - blocks a player may move between cooks before the streak resets
banquetRadius - Banquet effect radius in blocks
banquetDurationSeconds - Banquet buff duration in seconds
banquetAmplifier - Banquet potion effect amplifier (0 = level I)
banquetCooldownSeconds - Banquet cooldown in seconds
secondWindCooldownSeconds - Second Wind cooldown in seconds
perfectSearCooldownSeconds - Perfect Sear cooldown in seconds
public record CookingSkillConfig(long xpPerRecipe, long discoveryXp, long milestoneXp, double efficientCookChancePercent, double quickPrepReductionPercent, int seasonedHandsMaxStacks, double seasonedHandsQualityPerStack, double seasonedHandsXpPerStackPercent, long seasonedHandsResetSeconds, double seasonedHandsResetDistance, double banquetRadius, int banquetDurationSeconds, int banquetAmplifier, long banquetCooldownSeconds, long secondWindCooldownSeconds, long perfectSearCooldownSeconds) extends Record
Immutable snapshot of Sylphian-Skills-specific cooking configuration. Parse via from(FileConfiguration). Swap the reference on reload.

    • CookingSkillConfig

      public CookingSkillConfig(long xpPerRecipe, long discoveryXp, long milestoneXp, double efficientCookChancePercent, double quickPrepReductionPercent, int seasonedHandsMaxStacks, double seasonedHandsQualityPerStack, double seasonedHandsXpPerStackPercent, long seasonedHandsResetSeconds, double seasonedHandsResetDistance, double banquetRadius, int banquetDurationSeconds, int banquetAmplifier, long banquetCooldownSeconds, long secondWindCooldownSeconds, long perfectSearCooldownSeconds)
      Creates an instance of a CookingSkillConfig record class.
      Parameters:
      xpPerRecipe - the value for the xpPerRecipe record component
      discoveryXp - the value for the discoveryXp record component
      milestoneXp - the value for the milestoneXp record component

      banquetAmplifier - the value for the banquetAmplifier record component
      banquetCooldownSeconds - the value for the banquetCooldownSeconds record component
      secondWindCooldownSeconds - the value for the secondWindCooldownSeconds record component
      perfectSearCooldownSeconds - the value for the perfectSearCooldownSeconds record component

  • Method Details

    • from

      public static CookingSkillConfig from(org.bukkit.configuration.file.FileConfiguration config)
      Parses a CookingSkillConfig from the plugin's config.yml.
      Parameters:
      config - the loaded file configuration
      Returns:
      the parsed snapshot

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
